build: Build #27 — 200 OK + SSE text/event-stream with PLAIN TEXT chunk data

ui_result.user_experience: Back to empty 1-card outline. NO text content visible unlike Build #26.

console_errors: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request

diagnosis.conclusion: REGRESSION from Build #26. Plain text SSE chunks were NOT rendered in Gamma's UI. Build #26 (JSON data in chunks) showed characters in the outline; Build #27 (plain text data) shows nothing. This confirms Gamma's EventSource handler requires JSON-formatted data, not plain text.
diagnosis.key_finding: Gamma's outline parser processes chunk.data and expects it to be JSON-parseable. Plain text 'data:' lines are received by EventSource but discarded by the JSON parser. The characters visible in Build #26 were from JSON string parsing (each character of the JSON string treated as a token).

comparison.build_26_json_chunks: SSE parsed, JSON characters rendered vertically in outline (BREAKTHROUGH)
comparison.build_27_plain_text_chunks: SSE parsed by EventSource but plain text discarded by JSON parser (REGRESSION)

diagnosis.recommendation: Return to JSON data format (Build #26 approach) but structure the JSON to match Gamma's expected outline format. The outline parser expects a specific JSON schema — need to match it for proper rendering.
